data.title: AskSaud AI Portfolio Assistant
data.description: Answers questions about skills, projects, and experience in real-time using retrieval-augmented generation and streaming responses.
data.impact: Enhances user engagement with instant, relevant information.

data.title: Quiz Tic-Tac-Toe
data.description: Engages players in a classic tic-tac-toe game where each move requires answering quiz questions, enhancing both fun and knowledge.
data.impact: Combines entertainment with learning through 29 unique questions.

data.title: C++ Tic-Tac-Toe Game
data.description: Engages users in a console-based Tic-Tac-Toe game against a simple AI, featuring win/lose/draw detection and a visually formatted grid.
data.impact: Enhances programming skills through interactive game development.

data.title: Smart Robot Car
data.description: Operates in multiple modes including Bluetooth control, self-driving, and line following for hands-on robotics enthusiasts.
data.impact: Enhances understanding of robotics and automation.

data.title: Personal Profile Page
data.description: Showcases a personal profile and contact form, designed for individuals learning web development basics.
data.impact: Facilitates learning HTML through practical application.

data.title: Data Organizer
data.description: Organizes and categorizes datasets for easy access and management, targeting data analysts and researchers.
data.impact: Streamlines data management processes.

data.title: AI Attendance Management System
data.description: Automates attendance tracking in institutes using real-time face recognition, ensuring accurate and efficient monitoring of staff and students.
data.impact: Eliminates manual attendance processes, saving time and reducing errors.

data.title: HSE Performance Tracker
data.description: Monitors and analyzes health, safety, and environmental performance metrics for organizations, enhancing compliance and safety standards.
data.impact: Improves safety compliance and reduces incidents.

data.title: Saud Ahmad Portfolio
data.description: Showcases projects and expertise in LLM development, RAG architecture, and agentic AI solutions for potential clients and collaborators.
data.impact: Highlights diverse AI skills and projects.

data.title: LLM Assistant Comparison
data.description: Compares various LLM techniques for building a professional assistant that can respond on your behalf.
data.impact: Identifies the most effective LLM approach for user needs.

data.title: RAG AI
data.description: Generates responses using retrieval-augmented generation techniques for enhanced conversational AI applications.
data.impact: Improves response relevance and accuracy.

data.title: Agentic AI Projects
data.description: Develops autonomous AI agents for tasks like web scraping and resume parsing, enabling automation and efficiency for various applications.
data.impact: Facilitates real-world automation and task execution.

data.title: Face Recognition Attendance System
data.description: Automates attendance tracking using real-time face recognition for educational institutions and organizations.
data.impact: Eliminates manual attendance processes.

data.title: Breast Cancer Classifier
data.description: Classifies tumors as malignant or benign using deep learning techniques for medical data analysis.
data.impact: Improves diagnostic accuracy for breast cancer detection.

data.title: Predictive Modeling Projects
data.description: Explores real-world datasets to build predictive models for diabetes, Titanic survival, and customer churn using ML and DL techniques.
data.impact: Enhances understanding of predictive analytics through hands-on projects.

data.title: Contact Management System
data.description: Manages contact information using a Binary Search Tree for efficient data operations, ideal for users needing organized contact storage.
data.impact: Ensures efficient data handling and persistence.

data.title: C++ OOP Practice Collection
data.description: Showcases a variety of C++ programs focusing on Object-Oriented Programming concepts for learners and developers to enhance their skills.
data.impact: Facilitates hands-on learning of core and advanced OOP principles.

data.title: Python Statistics Visualizer
data.description: Demonstrates fundamental statistics and data visualization concepts using Python scripts for learners and practitioners.
data.impact: Enhances understanding of statistics through hands-on coding.

data.title: C++ Binary Search Tree
data.description: Implements a Binary Search Tree in C++ with features for insertion, deletion, and various tree traversals, aiding in understanding data structures.
data.impact: Enhances understanding of data structures and algorithms.

data.title: Bus Reservation System
data.description: Facilitates bus management by allowing users to add buses, reserve seats, and view bus details through a console interface.
data.impact: Streamlines bus reservation processes for users.

data.title: OpenCV Basics Toolkit
data.description: Demonstrates fundamental computer vision concepts using Python scripts for learners and enthusiasts.
data.impact: Builds a strong foundation for advanced computer vision applications.

data.title: Real-Time Face Recognition
data.description: Detects and recognizes faces in real-time using webcam input, enabling image comparison for facial similarity.
data.impact: Enhances security and personalization in applications.

data.title: ALU and Multiplier Circuit
data.description: Implements an Arithmetic and Logic Unit with an integrated multiplier circuit, designed for educational purposes in digital logic design.
data.impact: Facilitates hands-on learning in digital systems design.

data.title: Traffic Accident Insights
data.description: Analyzes traffic accident data from Pakistan to extract insights on accident frequency, injuries, and fatalities across regions and years.
data.impact: Enhances understanding of traffic safety trends.

data.title: C++ Data Structures Collection
data.description: Demonstrates fundamental and advanced data structures in C++ for learners and developers, featuring detailed implementations and comments.
data.impact: Enhances understanding of data structures through practical examples.

data.title: Energy Consumption Insights
data.description: Analyzes energy consumption data to extract insights for households, applying advanced data preprocessing and visualization techniques.
data.impact: Enhances understanding of energy usage patterns.

data.title: Access Vision Entry System
data.description: Automates and monitors entry and exit processes using face recognition and ultrasonic sensors for institutions, enhancing security and efficiency.
data.impact: Streamlines access control and data management.

data.title: Data Warehousing Journey
data.description: Documents the end-to-end process of data warehousing, focusing on data extraction, transformation, and loading for real-world datasets.
data.impact: Enhances data management skills through practical application.

data.title: Data Mining Lab
data.description: Documents hands-on learning in data mining, analysis, and machine learning through practical notebooks.
data.impact: Builds practical skills in data science.

data.title: Duplicate Question Detector
data.description: Detects duplicate questions using a BERT-based model, aiding platforms in improving user experience by reducing redundancy.
data.impact: Enhances question quality and user engagement.

data.title: Agrobot Weed Removal System
data.description: Operates an autonomous robot for weed detection, removal, and crop monitoring, enhancing agricultural efficiency.
data.impact: Improves crop yield by automating weed management.

data.title: Retail Insight Generator
data.description: Enables business users to query retail data in plain English, translating questions into SQL for actionable insights.
data.impact: Makes data exploration accessible without SQL expertise.

data.title: Data Science Toolkit
data.description: Provides essential tools and resources for data science projects, aiding data scientists in their workflows.
data.impact: Streamlines data science processes.

data.title: Data Science Tools Notebook
data.description: Provides a comprehensive notebook for learning essential data science tools and techniques, aimed at Coursera learners.
data.impact: Enhances learning experience for data science students.

data.title: Line-Following Robot
data.description: Builds a robot that detects and follows a line using IR sensors, ideal for robotics enthusiasts and educators.
data.impact: Enhances understanding of robotics and sensor integration.
